R

RegisterRequest - Class in request
Pojo for the Register request body
RegisterRequest() - Constructor for class request.RegisterRequest
Default Constructor
RegisterRequest(String, String, String, String, String, char) - Constructor for class request.RegisterRequest
Proper Constructor
RegisterResult - Class in result
Response body for the Register API call
RegisterResult() - Constructor for class result.RegisterResult
Default Constructor
RegisterResult(AuthToken, String, String) - Constructor for class result.RegisterResult
Proper constructor to return a register response body
RegisterService - Class in service
Handles the register functionality - Creates a new user account, generates 4 generations of ancestor data for the new user, logs the user in, and returns an auth token.
RegisterService() - Constructor for class service.RegisterService
 
registerUser(RegisterRequest) - Method in class service.RegisterService
 
removeAllEvents() - Method in class dataaccess.EventDao
Deletes all events from the database
removeAllPersons() - Method in class dataaccess.PersonDao
Deletes all persons from the database
removeAllUsers() - Method in class dataaccess.UserDao
Removes all users from the database
removeAuthToken(String) - Method in class dataaccess.AuthTokenDao
Remove an authToken from the database
removeEvent(String) - Method in class dataaccess.EventDao
Delete an event from the database
removePerson(String) - Method in class dataaccess.PersonDao
Delete an person from the database
removeUser(String) - Method in class dataaccess.UserDao
Remove a user from the database
request - package request
 
Request - Class in request
Default Request parent class
Request() - Constructor for class request.Request
 
result - package result
 
Result - Class in result
 
Result() - Constructor for class result.Result
Default constructor
Result(String) - Constructor for class result.Result
Proper constructor to generate a general response message
retrieveAllEvents(String) - Method in class service.EventService
All family members of the user
retrieveEvent(String) - Method in class service.EventIDService
Retrieves an event from a event ID
retrievePerson() - Method in class service.PersonIDService
Retrieve a single person out of the database
retrievePersons() - Method in class service.PersonService
Retrievve all family members of the current user
retrieveRelatives(AuthToken) - Method in class service.PersonService
Finds all the family members of the user
